zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Tipping於1547年之前出生在英國賀特福爾巴克萊時，她的父親Tipping21歲，母親Tipping20歲。她於1568年與Richard Thake在英國英格蘭賀特福爾巴克萊結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年10月1日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾巴克萊，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Tipping于1547年之前出生在英国賀特福爾巴克萊时，她的父亲Tipping21岁，母亲Tipping20岁。她于1568年与Richard Thake在英国英格兰賀特福爾巴克萊结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年10月1日在英国英格兰賀特福爾巴克萊，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Tipping
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from a Middle English and Old English personal name Tipping, a pet form of Old English Tippa, for which there is evidence in placenames such as Tiptree, but which is of uncertain origin. See Tipp .
from the Middle English personal name Tipun or Tipin, diminutives of the personal name Tipp or Tibb (see Tibbs ). The name was probably later absorbed by Tipping, Tippin, and Tippen.

variants.name: Tipp
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Tipp (Old English Tippa, of uncertain origin). Compare Tipping .
North German: from Low German tippe, tibbe ‘wooden pail, small tub’, perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a maker of those.

variants.name: Tippins
meanings: English (Herefordshire and Gloucestershire): variant of Tipping , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Monmouthshire, Wales.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Tipping was born before 1547, in Barley, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Tipping, was 21 and her mother, Tipping, was 20. She married Richard Thake in 1568, in Barley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 October 1600, in Barley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Tipping est née avant 1547, à Barley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Tipping, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Tipping, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Thake en 1568, à Barley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1600, à Barley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Tipping vor 1547 in Barley, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Tipping 21 und ihre Mutter Tipping 20. Sie hat 1568 in Barley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Thake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1600 in Barley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tipping è nata il prima del 1547 nel Barley, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Tipping, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Tipping, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Richard Thake nel 1568, nel Barley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 ottobre 1600, nel Barley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Tippingが1547年以前にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバーリーで生まれた時，父Tippingは21歳，母Tippingは20歳であった。1568年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバーリーでRichard Thakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年10月1日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバーリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Tipping(이)가 1547년 이전 영국 허트퍼드실르 발리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Tipping(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tipping(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 발리에서 Richard Thake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 10월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 발리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Tipping родилась перед 1547 г. в местности барли, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Tipping было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Tipping, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Thake в 1568 г. в местности барли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 октября 1600 г. в местности барли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
